channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Companies Balance AI Opportunities With Fear of AI Bubble
item.description: After Microsoft paused some development of data centers in spring 2025, the company was surprised to see the demand for artificial intelligence services race past its ability to provide them, Bloomberg reported Wednesday (April 1). At the time Microsoft made … [Microsoft, Intel]

item.title: Dan Pratl believes the credibility economy is coming and it will redefine value in the age of AI
item.description: A growing sense of unease is shaping how professionals engage with artificial intelligence, particularly as its capabilities expand across information creation and execution. Dan Pratl, founder of Quadron, believes this anxiety reflects a deeper structural is… [Intel]

item.title: US Economy: Tech Company Layoffs to Afford AI Data Centers
item.description: Oracle is building new data centers in Michigan and Texas with additional expansion projected. The result? Over 30,000 global employees fired with additional cuts coming this month. The pink slip: “… the position you currently hold will become redundant.” A… [Oracle]

item.title: Oracle’s layoffs signal deepening AI threat for software firms and employees
item.description: Mint learns that about 12,000-15,000 of Oracle’s layoffs will be in India, which has a total of 30,000 employees, according to at least four people with knowledge of the matter. [Oracle]

item.title: TSMC’s US Expansion Plans Grow More Aggressive With Twelve Planned Arizona Fabs, as Sole Reliance on Taiwan Appears to Be a ‘Dead End’
item.description: TSMC's US fab network is growing at an unprecedented pace, and according to a new report, the chip giant is eager to build a 'GigaFab' cluster in Arizona that rivals Taiwan's output. TSMC's Arizona Is Expected To Turn Out To Be a Taiwan-Level Fab Network, Dri… [TSMC]

item.title: Dan Herbatschek Sees $1 Trillion AI Spend Crisis as Enterprise AI Costs Surge
item.description: New Research: global enterprise AI cost curve is accelerating toward a $1 trillion annual spend threshold...

item.title: Influencer Marketing Platform Market Size to Hit USD 197.69 Billion by 2035 | SNS Insider
item.description: The Influencer Marketing Platform Market is expanding rapidly as brands shift to AI-driven, performance-based creator campaigns, with the U.S. segment growing from USD 10.32 billion in 2025 to USD 77.93 billion by 2035. The Influencer Marketing Platform Marke…
